title: AEE Decision Evidence Fragment
description: Reusable schema fragment for structured decision evidence in AEE result payloads. See AEE spec Section 13.

inputs_used.description: Names or identifiers of inputs the agent considered

context_refs.description: Locators or IDs of referenced context (envelopes, documents, tools)

reason_summary.description: Why this decision was made (1-3 sentences)

action_taken.description: What the agent did as a result

confidence.description: Agent self-assessed confidence (0 = no confidence, 1 = certain)
